name: Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite image (Nano Banana 2 Lite)
description: Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite image (Nano Banana 2 Lite) is a prepared catalog entry for a lower-latency image generation and editing variant expected to follow Google's Nano Banana 2 image model line. It is not marked as released until an official Google AI Studio or Vertex model record appears.

details.name: source_status
